title: Finnish phone-maker HMD bundles Indian AI chatbot onto new smartphone in push to reach local market
summary: HMD is pre-loading Sarvam's Indus chatbot, which supports 22 Indic languages, onto new smartphones to expand into the Indian market. The localization strategy helps the Finnish phone-maker compete in a key emerging market by offering language support tailored to local users.
content: HMD is pre-loading Sarvam's Indus chatbot app, which supports 22 Indic languages

zh.title: 芬兰手机制造商HMD在新智能手机上预装印度AI聊天机器人以拓展本地市场
zh.summary: HMD正在新智能手机上预装Sarvam公司的Indus聊天机器人，该机器人支持22种印度语言，以扩展印度市场。本地化策略通过提供针对本地用户的语言支持，帮助芬兰手机制造商在这个关键新兴市场竞争。

title: Ground system issue scrubs first launch of SpaceX's Starship V3 rocket
summary: SpaceX's first Starship V3 launch was postponed due to a ground system issue, with engineers targeting another attempt as soon as Friday evening. The delay highlights the technical challenges of developing the company's next-generation heavy-lift launch vehicle.
content: Engineers could make another attempt to launch Starship as soon as Friday evening.

zh.title: 地面系统问题导致SpaceX星舰V3火箭首次发射被取消
zh.summary: SpaceX星舰V3首次发射因地面系统问题被延期，工程师们计划最早在周五晚上进行下一次尝试。延期突出了开发该公司下一代重型运载火箭所面临的技术挑战。

title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
summary: Waymo has expanded its robotaxi service suspension to Atlanta and San Antonio after vehicles drove into flooded roads. The operational halt highlights ongoing safety challenges in adverse weather conditions. The company is working to prevent autonomous vehicles from navigating dangerous road conditions.
content: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

zh.title: Waymo扩大暂停范围至四个城市，机器人出租车仍驶入洪水
zh.summary: Waymo在车辆驶入洪水道路后，将其机器人出租车服务暂停扩大到亚特兰大和圣安东尼奥。这次运营中断突显了恶劣天气条件下持续存在的安全挑战。该公司正在努力防止自动驾驶车辆在危险道路条件下行驶。

title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
summary: SpaceX aborted its first Starship V3 launch moments before liftoff after fueling was complete. The company plans to reattempt the launch on Friday. The scrub reflects final safety checks or technical issues identified during final countdown procedures.
content: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again Friday.

zh.title: SpaceX在起飞前取消首次星舰V3发射
zh.summary: SpaceX在加注完成后于起飞前片刻中止了首次星舰V3的发射。该公司计划在周五重新尝试发射。这次取消反映了在最终倒数计时程序中发现的最终安全检查或技术问题。
